intentSynonyms: get a shareable maps link in gmaps
description: Get a shareable Google Maps URL for the current map view or a specific location. The URL can be shared with others to show the same location on Google Maps.

lat.description: Latitude. Uses current map center if omitted.

lng.description: Longitude. Uses current map center if omitted.

zoom.description: Zoom level (1-21). Uses current zoom if omitted.
